blocks.text: Each target is a member of `AllowedSurfaceSet` and is decided independently by trust tier.

rows: provider permission mode enum, such as Claude `default`, `acceptEdits`, `plan`; `bypassPermissions` rejected
enum plus provider activation decision, such as `read-only`, `workspace-write`, policy-owned `danger-full-access`
mode plus allowlist: default-off, explicit allowlist, or unrestricted
path glob list such as `.git/**`, `.env*`, secrets dirs, prod config
scoped-token policy: TTL, scope limit, env delivery rejection, log redaction
blocked shell command patterns such as `rm -rf`, `dd of=/dev/`, force push, DB drop
repo, branch, and env allow matrix; `main` push needs human approval
allowed MCP server ids plus transport limits
task-level policy files materialized into workdir

blocks.text: Secret exposure redaction marker/catalog details are owned by [`../security-redaction.md`](../security-redaction.md).
This document owns target enum values and meanings. Adjacent contexts consume only decisions, such as "T-SBX -> workspace-write".
